item.title:

We’re live o
item.description:
Sky Sports Premier League reposteó Sky Sports News @SkySportsNews · 8min Got a question for The FPL Show?
We’re live on Sky Sports News tomorrow from 9:30am covering the best free hit teams, free hit vs wildcard, and triple captaining Haaland
Reply with your questions and the best ones will be answered LIVE on air 9 1 39 12 mil

item.title:
OptaAnalyst: Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 4min Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe takes on his old employers Bournemouth on Saturday.
H
item.description:
Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 4min Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe takes on his old employers Bournemouth on Saturday.
How the Magpies' final six games go this season could be pivotal in how progress of the project at St. James' Park is viewed. De theanalyst.com 2 816

item.title:
SkySportsPL: Sky Sports Premier League @SkySportsPL · 9min "We can't cry, we have to be stronger"
Roberto De Zerbi says he wants all
item.description:
Sky Sports Premier League @SkySportsPL · 9min "We can't cry, we have to be stronger"
Roberto De Zerbi says he wants all of his players to be leaders against Brighton as they push for their first win of 2026 23 11 78 10 mil
